title: RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT - 211info
text: FORA HEALTH RESIDENTIAL TREATMENT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers gender-specific residential substance abuse treatment programs with integrated mental health services for clients. Also offers family therapy, dual diagnosis, and medically monitored residential treatments. 10230 SE Cherry Blossom Drive Portland, OR 97216 Eligibility: Age 18 and older with primary diagnosis of alcohol or drug addictive disorders Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (503) 535-1151 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 535-1151 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website to complete residential interest form FEES: Accepts OHP and most private insurance plans DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable LANGUAGES: English, Spanish, interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: TriMet bus 15-stop 10500 Block SE Cherry Blossom; Bus 20 stops SE Washington & 105th Street and SE Stark & 105th; MAX green line stop SE Main Street Services: Residential Substance Use Disorder Treatment Facilities Other Services Offered At This Location: SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - ADULT TREATMENT CENTER SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - DETOX SERVICES SUBSTANCE USE DISORDER SERVICES - OUTPATIENT MEDICATIONS TO TREAT ADDICTION If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FORA HEALTH
